_schema: Dialogue tree. Nodes: speaker line + options. Option fields: text, requires {background|perk|min_reputation}, check {skill, odds}, goto | success/failure gotos, effects [ops]. Both check branches MUST exist and both must be content. DRAFT text pending director voice approval (gate #1).

intro.speaker: hollis
intro.text: Baler quit on me mid-field. Second cutting's lying out there and rain's due. Dealer says Thursday. Hay don't wait for Thursday.

options.text: "Let me look at that baler myself."
options.label: [Mechanic 40]

options.text: "I can lend you my time. Show me what to do."
"Rough luck, Hollis. Hope Thursday comes quick."

fix_success.speaker: hollis
fix_success.text: Well I'll be. She sounds better than the day Roy sold her to me. You've got a gift, and I've got a big mouth — Marge is gonna hear about this.

fix_failure.speaker: hollis
fix_failure.text: ...That was the good hydraulic line. Thursday just got a lot more expensive, son. Don't take it hard — but don't take it to the diner neither, 'cause it's already there.

lend_hand.speaker: hollis
lend_hand.text: Appreciate the hands. Won't save the cutting, but it saves the week. I remember who shows up.
